message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as C1
participant "Server" as S1
participant "Other Client" as C2
participant "Other Client" as C3

participant "Client" as C4
participant "Server" as S2
participant "Other Client" as C4

C1 ..> S1 : changeVideoServer
S1 ..> C2 : changeVideoClient
S2 ..> C4 : callback

@enduml
